docking_bays.Bay 1: Emergency rescue—ESC-3217 collar engaged, COU-5016 stabilized, evacuation ongoing
docking_bays.Bay 2: Occupied—threatened by chunk two impact; 35 meters closure rate critical

SCI-2245.notes: Debris tracking intensifying; secondary scan complete—no survivors detected in debris field; now coordinating with station on trajectory predictions.

ORE-3312.notes: Maintaining position; debris perimeter still 2.3 sectors distant; monitoring broadcast alerts continuously.

COU-5521.notes: Fuel reserves critical at 15%; shields degraded to 48%; chunk three still locked; awaiting course correction clearance urgently.

ESC-8643.notes: Chunk two intercept vector recalculated; now 35 meters from Bay 2 entrance; firing solution locked; secondary engagement imminent.

COU-5016.notes: Hull breach contained; crew egress 78% complete; ESC-3217 collar holding stable; power transfer stabilizing; medical teams standing by in Bay 1.

SAL-3188.notes: Debris perimeter now 1.8 sectors away and expanding; operations continuing with heightened caution.

ESC-3217.notes: Emergency collar secure; transferring full emergency power to COU-5016; final crew evacuation pod launching in seconds; containment field stress rising.

ESC-611.notes: En route to debris perimeter; tactical updates continuous; ready to engage debris trajectory threats if ordered.

SCI-7817.notes: Still holding pending clearance; deep-space science mission postponed indefinitely; monitoring station emergency frequencies.

active_events: ESC-3217 emergency collar holding COU-5016 stable; final crew evacuation 78% complete; medical teams mobilizing.
Chunk two now 35 meters from Bay 2; ESC-8643 firing solution locked; secondary defense intercept incoming.
COU-5521 fuel at 15% critical threshold; course correction still awaited; three minutes to mandatory engine shutdown.
Station containment field at 83% integrity; secondary power drain accelerating; core systems rerouting to Bay 1 support.
Debris perimeter expanding into Lane 2 at accelerated rate; Lane 3 and 4 now fully restricted; only Lane 5 remains marginal.
current_arc: Corvette sustains crippled courier as debris closes on docks; station power failing under kinetic assault; fuel emergency imminent.
recent_transmissions: CAPT-SCI-2245: CAPT-SCI-2245 to Tower, requesting status on emergency distress beacon deployment; is SCI-2245's request being processed?
AI: Alert: Sector one containment breach protocols failed; station's energy shields now compensating for destabilized sector; multiple docking bays at risk; emergency response teams mobilizing.
TOWER: Tower to CAPT-COU-5521, Lane 1 is impassable; Lane 2 restricted; debris trajectory suggests imminent impact; request immediate status update.
CAPT-ESC-3217: CAPT-ESC-3217 to Tower, ETA to COU-5016 is 75 seconds; requesting permission to deploy emergency docking collar upon arrival.
CAPT-ESC-3217: CAPT-ESC-3217 to Tower, requesting confirmation on Bay 1 status; is it safe for docking?
AI: Warning: Tractor beam arrest on COU-5016 failing; station defense systems deploying containment field to prevent hull rupture; emergency response teams preparing for rescue operation.
TOWER: Tower to CAPT-ESC-3217, Bay 1 status is critical; debris imminent; prepare for possible containment field engagement upon arrival; confirm docking collar deployment protocol.
CAPT-ESC-3217: CAPT-ESC-3217 to Tower, confirm Bay 1 status is critical; debris imminent; will deploy emergency docking collar upon arrival; protocol confirmed.
AI: Warning: COU-5016 hull breach detected; station medics preparing emergency response team; Bay 1 lockdown status unchanged; debris chunk two 50 meters from dock entrance.
TOWER: Tower to CAPT-SCI-2245, Lane 1 impassable; recommend caution when navigating sector one perimeter due to expanding debris field.
CAPT-SCI-2245: CAPT-SCI-2245 to Tower, report on Bay 1 status and any impact on our position near sector one edge; secondary debris trajectories tracked.
CAPT-SCI-2245: CAPT-SCI-2245 to Tower, Bay 1 status and containment field integrity impact on our position near sector one edge; request updated trajectory analysis for secondary debris threats.

AI: Warning: Station containment field holding at 86% integrity; secondary power drain accelerating; core systems rerouting; debris chunk three 30 meters from Bay 2 entrance; military/navy on standby for escort corvette ESC-8643.
TOWER: Tower to CAPT-SCI-2245, Bay 1 status update: rescue in progress; hull breach contained; crew egress 60% complete; containment field holding; debris chunk two 50 meters from dock entrance.
CAPT-SCI-2245: CAPT-SCI-2245 to Tower, request Bay 2 status and any threats posed by debris chunk two, now 50 meters from dock entrance.
AI: Warning: Bay 2 containment field integrity critical; debris chunk two trajectory recalculated; collision expected in 5.7 minutes; emergency evacuation procedures initiated for docked ships.
CAPT-SCI-2245: CAPT-SCI-2245 to Tower, Bay 2 status: is docked ship COU-5521 receiving course correction clearance due to impending fuel emergency.
TOWER: Tower to CAPT-ESC-8643, Bay 2 containment field integrity critical; chunk two trajectory recalculated; collision expected in 5.7 minutes; prepare for possible containment breach.
AI: Warning: station core power now 72% depleted; containment field integrity dropping by 0.5% every 15 seconds; secondary systems failing across station infrastructure.
CAPT-SCI-2245: CAPT-SCI-2245 to Tower, is COU-5521 receiving course correction clearance due to impending fuel emergency; what is current status of COU-5521.

pending_queries.query: Requesting emergency course correction authorization to exit sector one
Requesting secondary intercept authorization for chunk two ricochet trajectory
